title: Heavens Door
wikitext:
[]: Heaven's Door             Quote Post by Clover » Sat Jan 21, 2012 11:25 pm What was "Heaven's Door" or "Gate" in ep. 24, anyway? The way people enter that room is always so obscure and terminal dogma itself is such an alien geometry nightmare, that this never made sense to me. I understand there was a keycard slot that opened the door, but what was up with the red lined hallway Kaworu floated down and how did he get there from the atrium? Is that how normal people get to Lilith? Can LCL even freeze? What is the generally accepted fanwank on this, because in a fanfic I'm reading it's a gigantic golden door. Did they show that in the series/rebuild and I just forgot?

[]:             Quote Post by symbv » Sun Jan 22, 2012 3:02 am You have the context of the dialogues where it was mentioned?

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sun Jan 22, 2012 4:41 am Beyond being a "we listen to Bobby Dylan" reference, the layout of the geofront is -- like most everything else -- what the plot demands at the moment. Shinji, Kaworu and their Evas fall down this convenient shaft (where Kaworu has opened all the barriers) to land in this place of odd pillars (of salt?), from which it's just a straight hike to where Lilith is crucified. Then there's this other shaft where Rei appears just after the Shigeru: Final safety system released. Makoto: Heaven's Door is opening.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Sun Jan 22, 2012 5:50 am Heaven's Door may simply be a title to represent the chamber entrance to the home of the so-to-speak "god" they have crucified within Terminal Dogma. More religious flash to be sprinkled into the plot.

Article: Heavens Door
[]: Heaven's Door             Quote Post by Clover » Sat Jan 21, 2012 11:25 pm What was "Heaven's Door" or "Gate" in ep. 24, anyway? The way people enter that room is always so obscure and terminal dogma itself is such an alien geometry nightmare, that this never made sense to me. I understand there was a keycard slot that opened the door, but what was up with the red lined hallway Kaworu floated down and how did he get there from the atrium? Is that how normal people get to Lilith? Can LCL even freeze? What is the generally accepted fanwank on this, because in a fanfic I'm reading it's a gigantic golden door. Did they show that in the series/rebuild and I just forgot?

Shinji, Kaworu and their Evas fall down this convenient shaft (where Kaworu has opened all the barriers) to land in this place of odd pillars (of salt?), from which it's just a straight hike to where Lilith is crucified. Then there's this other shaft where Rei appears just after the Shigeru: Final safety system released. Makoto: Heaven's Door is opening.
